basic_details.job_title: HLL Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for HR Officer, Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL) - HINDLABS Healthcare Services Division (HCS)
basic_details.total_vacancies: Lab Technician, Accounts Officer, District Project Coordinator, HR Officer, IT Officer, Lab Coordinator, Consultant Pathologist, Consultant Histopathologist, Consultant Microbiologist
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare HINDLABS Chhattisgarh Recruitment 2026: Get the latest HLL Lifecare recruitment notification 2026 for Lab Technician, Accounts Officer, District Project Coordinator, HR Officer, IT Officer, Lab Coordinator and Consultant posts under HINDLABS Healthcare Services Division (HCS), HLL Lifecare Limited, for Medical Laboratory Project in Chhattisgarh. The Walk-in Interview process starts on 3rd May 2026 across multiple locations in Chhattisgarh. Find HLL Lifecare HINDLABS vacancies across Chhattisgarh on the official website lifecarehll.com. You can also get Free Job Alert of “Upcoming

application_fee.details: No application fee details are mentioned in the notification. This is a Walk-in Interview based recruitment - candidates must appear directly at the respective venue on the scheduled date with all required original documents.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all FTC positions is 37 years as on 01-05-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwD category candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all qualification and experience criteria as mentioned below. Only candidates meeting the required qualification and experience will be allowed to attend the skill test and written test. Candidates must bring all original certificates along with self-attested copies at the time of Walk-in Interview. | Post-wise Qualification, Experience and Pay Range

selection_process: Stage 2 Written Test - MCQ Based, 50 Marks, 30 Minutes, No Negative Marking (only for candidates qualifying Skill Test)

The selection process for FTC positions comprises a Skill Test followed by a Written Test. Only candidates who qualify in the Skill Test will be allowed to attend the Written Test. The Written Test consists of multiple-choice questions (MCQ) to be answered within 30 minutes with a maximum score of 50. There is no negative marking for wrong answers in the Written Test.
how_to_apply: Candidates for FTC positions must Walk-in for the interview at the respective location on the scheduled date between 09:00 AM and 01:00 PM. No prior registration is required for Walk-in. Candidates must carry all original certificates along with one set of self-attested copies at the time of interview. Failure to produce original documents will disqualify the candidate from appearing for the selection test.
Interested Consultant Pathologist (MD), Consultant Histopathologist (MD), and Consultant Microbiologist (MD) candidates must forward their updated CVs to [email protected] on or before 30-05-2026.
Documents to Carry at the Time of Walk-in Interview:
important_instructions: The appointment will be on Fixed Tenure Contract (FTC) basis only. Candidates must meet the required qualification and experience criteria to be eligible for the skill test and written test. Only candidates qualifying in the Skill Test will be allowed to attend the Written Test. The proposed place of posting may vary as per business requirements - management reserves the right to determine the final posting location. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates will be as per Government of India rules. Canvassing in any form will be a disqualification. Candidates must bring all original certificates along with self-attested copies - failure to produce originals will disqualify the candidate. SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates must produce their original Community Certificate from concerned Revenue Authorities. Reporting time at all venues is 09:00 AM to 01:00 PM on the respective interview date. For further clarification, contact: 9203651344 or email [email protected]. All decisions of HLL Lifecare management regarding eligibility, selection, and posting are final and binding.
